title: Specialists
description: Plugin that make your server Role-Play better. Specialists creating special services and systems for calling them (ex. Police, Detectives, Bankeers and others). Also, means of detaining criminals will be added to your server for the police.
body: A plugin that will improve the Role Play on your minecraft server. The plugin will add standard services that you can issue to players without creating a separate role in LuckPerms, and will also allow you to create your own services and add your server players to them. An ordinary player will have the opportunity to call a special service to himself by entering the command /spec call. The notification of the call will be sent to the employees of this service both in the game and in their own Discord via the webhooks system (optional). Among other things, this plugin will allow people from the "Police" service to detain players using leashes, pretending to be handcuffs.
